validatedRules: Resource is base64 Brotli AppPackageInfo JSON
decoded Resource is AppPackageInfo, not YAP ListExportResult
Childs entries use Fields, not Defs
Sign is produced by server signing flow
dashboard Data table columns include Field and FieldName

knownFailuresResolved.lesson: schema v2 wrapper/resource shape alone was not enough
no-portal PortalInfo must not be an empty array

proofBoundary: Install success is proven by user report. App open, dashboard render, child-list inspection, record creation, workflow/action execution, and full UI runtime behavior remain separate checks.
